scripts.dev: bash -lc 'pids=(); cleanup(){ for pid in "${pids[@]}"; do kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; done; }; trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM; npm run dev:api & pids+=($!); npm run dev:web & pids+=($!); wait "${pids[@]}"'
scripts.dev:api: bash -lc 'cd apps/api && poetry run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.lint:api: bash -lc 'cd apps/api && poetry run ruff check app tests'
scripts.format:api: bash -lc 'cd apps/api && poetry run ruff format app tests'
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
